title: Japanese ship Kaede
summary:
Several ships have been named Kaede (楓 / かえで; "maple") :

Japanese destroyer Kaede (1915), a Kaba-class destroyer of the Imperial Japanese Navy during World War I
Japanese destroyer Kaede (1944), a Matsu-class destroyer of the Imperial Japanese Navy during World War II
JDS Kaede (PF-13, PF-293), a Kusu-class patrol frigate of the Japan Maritime Self-Defense Force, formerly USS Newport (PF-27)
